acceptance_criteria: jj serve --cwd . dashboard recent runs link to a per-run detail page.

The run detail route accepts only run IDs resolved under the guarded .jj/runs root and rejects traversal, encoded traversal, absolute-path, and symlink escape attempts with deterministic 403 or 404 responses.

The page displays run status, timestamps, planner/provider metadata, dry-run mode, generated doc links, artifact availability, evaluation result, Codex result metadata, sanitized command metadata, and disclosure-safe security diagnostics when present.
Artifact links are relative guarded URLs limited to intended docs and run artifact roots, not filesystem paths.
Missing manifests, malformed manifests, missing artifacts, and older manifests without diagnostics render safe deterministic states without server errors.

Rendered HTML and dashboard responses do not contain raw secrets, token-looking values, private key material, [jj-omitted], raw command text, raw environment values, absolute denied paths, or attacker-controlled denied path payloads.
Dry-run and non-dry-run run detail pages use the same redaction and path-boundary behavior.
Existing dashboard behavior remains unchanged except for added run-detail links.
